name: Orpheus' Revenge
short_description: Get ready to put your mouse to use and get smack talked by a bunch of pixels!  Orpheus' Revenge is an 80s inspired arcade shooter with more sass than sense. Pixel graphics, neon colours and electronic beats meet greek mythology.
detailed_description:
You descend into the underworld again, armed with nothing but anger and a steady aim. Orpheus is no longer here to sing - he’s here to shoot. Face wrathful gods, petty ghosts, and old regrets as you fight your way through a myth’s darkest corners. The path forward is painted in neon blood and shiny explosions.

In Orpheus’ Revenge, you get to shoot your way through seven cursed stages of the underworld - from rivers of oblivion to burning halls of judgment. Battle spiteful bosses, dodge vengeful ghosts, and rack up your score in free mode. The further you get the more you will suffer. Will you beat Hades himself... or just add to the body count?

Inspired by arcade shooters and infused with 80s flair, Orpheus’ Revenge blends fast-paced click-to-kill combat with humour, vibrant aesthetics, and electro-synth beats. Designed for both challenge and the chance to relax this game dares you to click your way through heartbreak and hubris - again and again.

  • Pixel Art & Neon: An 80s-style arcade underworld. Expect vibrant backdrops, cursed palettes, and synthwave beats.

  • Click-to-Kill Mayhem: No cooldowns, no reloads - just click your way through spirits and spiteful bosses.

  • Trash-Talking Bosses: Why get roasted online when pixelated deities can insult your aim and your life choices?

  • High Score: No saves, just skill. Track your best runs and try not to rage quit.
